title: Sleep and Immune System Connection After 40: Why Poor Sleep Makes You Sick
seo_title: Sleep and Immune System After 40: Why Sleep Deprivation Weakens Immunity
meta_description: Poor sleep suppresses immune function, raises inflammation, and impairs vaccine response. Learn how sleep and immunity are connected after 40 and how to restore both.
tags: Sleep, Immunity, Inflammation, Women Over 40, Sleep Health, Longevity
